## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content performance and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [781 articles now live; performance near all-time highs with non-branded content excelling](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [LLM referrals steady at \~15-16% of traffic (above 10% benchmark); GPT up, Copilot down](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Link building progressing; report expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Datagrid website launch imminent; Marcel & Tiago to meet Sept 9th for SoW updates](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [781 articles now live, including this week's batch](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Overall performance increased week-over-week, close to all-time highs set 2 weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Google traffic slightly up; largest jump from Bing and LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Non-branded performance hitting new highs](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Older, proven clusters carried performance; new clusters underperformed](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [No loss of search result positions, indicating seasonal dip](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

### LLM Referrals

  - [Overall LLM referrals remained steady](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GPT referrals increased](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Copilot referrals decreased (from already low levels)](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Datagrid at \~15-16% LLM referral traffic (vs. 10% industry benchmark)](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

### Link Building Progress

  - [Proceeding as planned](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [External partners' report expected next week](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Upcoming Meetings and Deliverables

  - [Marcel and Tiago scheduled to meet on September 9th](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Discussion to include updated Statement of Work (SoW)](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Mara to join the meeting as well](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Website Launch

  - [Datagrid website launch expected very soon](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Team expressing excitement and anticipation](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Await link building report from external partners (expected next week)](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Monitor Datagrid website launch](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Follow up after Marcel & Tiago's meeting on Sept 9th for SoW updates and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Continue monitoring content performance, especially new clusters and LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/d9eAEdDzMxQxa1wYSW1vgA_-1A5Nyx-t?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
